nodes.name: Cron: 23:00 PHT daily
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 23:00 PHT (15:00 UTC). Reconciles IMIS totals vs CAS2000 journal debits for yesterday PHT.

nodes.name: Compute yesterday PHT
nodes.notes: Produces the PHT date string for yesterday (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*)::int           AS transaction_count,
  COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0)::numeric(14,4) AS imis_total
FROM transactions
WHERE status IN ('posted', 'reconciled')
  AND DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Manila') = '{{ $json.reconciliation_date }}'::date

nodes.name: Query IMIS totals
nodes.notes: Sums posted/reconciled transactions for yesterday PHT.

nodes.name: GET CAS2000 daily totals
nodes.notes: Fetches sum of journal debits from CAS2000 for the reconciliation date.

nodes.name: Merge: Wait for both branches
nodes.notes: Waits for both IMIS DB query and CAS2000 HTTP request to complete before proceeding. Prevents the Code node being triggered twice (once per branch).

nodes.name: Compare and compute variance
nodes.notes: Computes variance = IMIS total - CAS total. Status: 'matched' | 'variance' | 'pending' (CAS unavailable).

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO reconciliation_results
  (reconciliation_date, imis_total, cas_total_debits, variance,
   matched_count, unmatched_count, status, details)
VALUES
  ($1::date, $2::numeric, $3::numeric, $4::numeric,
   $5::int,   $6::int,   $7::text,   $8::jsonb)
ON CONFLICT (reconciliation_date)
DO UPDATE SET
  imis_total       = EXCLUDED.imis_total,
  cas_total_debits = EXCLUDED.cas_total_debits,
  variance         = EXCLUDED.variance,
  matched_count    = EXCLUDED.matched_count,
  unmatched_count  = EXCLUDED.unmatched_count,
  status           = EXCLUDED.status,
  details          = EXCLUDED.details,
  updated_at       = now()

nodes.name: Upsert reconciliation_results
nodes.notes: Upserts today's reconciliation result using parameterised $1–$8 — safe for JSONB details containing apostrophes or special characters.

parameters.subject: =[IMIS ALERT] Reconciliation variance detected for {{ $node['Compute yesterday PHT'].json.reconciliation_date }}

nodes.name: Email: variance alert to finance_officer
nodes.notes: Sends email to finance_officer when variance > 0.01 PHP.

parameters.jsonBody: ={"source_system":"CAS2000","operation":"IMIS-CAS-RECONCILE","status":"success","payload":{"reconciliation_date":"{{ $node['Compute yesterday PHT'].json.reconciliation_date }}","status":"{{ $node['Compare and compute variance'].json.status }}","imis_total":{{ $node['Compare and compute variance'].json.imis_total }},"cas_total":{{ $node['Compare and compute variance'].json.cas_total_debits }},"variance":{{ $node['Compare and compute variance'].json.variance }}}}
